description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a distinctive delta wing configuration. The exterior is painted in a camouflage pattern of green, gray, and brown, with roundels and insignia visible on the wings and tail, indicating military use. The aircraft features a single vertical stabilizer at the rear and a single engine exhaust nozzle, suggesting a single jet engine. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a transparent canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel under the cockpit. The overall design is optimized for speed and maneuverability, typical of fighter jets.
description: A military jet aircraft with a delta wing, camouflage paint, single vertical stabilizer, and front-mounted enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the jet, camouflage paint, cockpit canopy, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the delta wing shape, single engine exhaust, and vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the aircraft's profile, tail insignia, and landing gear details.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and symmetrical delta wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-mounted delta wing with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; swept leading edges.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and integrated horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy.
